subcodes.first_line: The revelation of the Book from Him Who is mighty and all-knowing unto him who hath migrated unto God and whom tribulations have touched in His path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تنزیل الکتاب من لدن عزیز علیما الی الذی هاجر الی الله و مسته الشداید فی سبیل
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation
